column1: PLAZA Logística (Zaragoza) — B2B prospect list for short-term / corporate-rental apartment outreach

column2: Two entry points — see the 'Source / Entry point' column on each row.
https://www.plazalogistica.com/empresas/?lang=en (official PLAZA park directory, 34 companies). Detail page: /empresainstalada/<slug>/
paginasamarillas.es (Zaragoza, relevant sectors) + public registries/directories (eInforma, elEconomista/Empresite, Axesor, Cámara Zaragoza, Aliaragón). 24 added Zaragoza companies.
Prioritised medium/large employers in industrial, manufacturing, logistics/transport, engineering, IT/tech, energy, automotive, food & healthcare. Tiny retail/hospitality skipped.
Name sourced from Páginas Amarillas; website/contact not yet verified — flagged for a 2nd-pass enrichment on request.
Has a named HR/leadership contact OR confirmed general email + LinkedIn + size
Has general email/website/LinkedIn but no named HR contact yet
Directory baseline only — needs a second enrichment pass
Email published on the company's own site or the PLAZA directory
Built from the company's visible email pattern (e.g. name.surname@company.com) — NOT verified; verify before sending

The verified recruitment route. Note: NONE of these companies publish a dedicated rrhh@/seleccion@/empleo@ mailbox — they recruit via web forms / InfoJobs / portals. Cell shows the route + any general inbox. Only Berdiel publishes a usable address (owner's).

Best-guess personal email for the named HR/leadership contact, built from the company's email pattern (pattern source noted, usually RocketReach/published address). UNVERIFIED. 'Low-confidence guess' = pattern could not be established. Always verify before sending.
Names/titles taken from LinkedIn are view-only and unverified. LinkedIn does not publish emails.

This is a B2B prospect list. Outreach to named individuals should rely on the legitimate-interest legal basis (GDPR Art.6(1)(f) / Spanish LOPDGDD & LSSI for e-marketing), be relevant to the person's professional role, and include a clear opt-out in every message. Honour opt-outs and keep a record of the legitimate-interest assessment.
19 Zaragoza city/province companies added from the elEconomista company ranking (ranking-empresas.eleconomista.es) cross-checked against eInforma/Axesor/Empresite, company websites and LinkedIn.
elEconomista ranking (ranking-empresas.eleconomista.es) + web — see the Source/Entry point column on each batch-2 row.

Large/medium Zaragoza employers missing from batch 1: automotive (Valeo Térmico, Fujikura, Adient), industrial mfg (Schindler, CAF, Lecitrailer, HMY Yudigar, Megasider, Novapet), logistics/distribution (Carreras, Adidas España, Alliance Healthcare, Proclinic, Novaltia), top employers (Stellantis Figueruelas, Ibercaja, Inditex/Plataforma Europa) and food (ICT Ibérica/Lucart, Tereos).

Stellantis, Ibercaja, Inditex, Adidas etc. centralise HR/recruitment via portals (no public HR mailbox). Most batch-2 rows are status=partial: full firmographics + confirmed recruitment route, but no named HR contact. Inferred emails follow each group email convention and are UNVERIFIED — verify before sending.
Aludium (no Aragón/Zaragoza site); Cuarte/Saica Pack/Trans Sesé etc. omitted as duplicates of existing parent entries.
Two columns appended to the PLAZA Companies sheet.

Every published/verbatim email located for the company (general, department, DPO and any named-person addresses), each with its source. "None found verbatim" = only web form/phone, or domain behind an anti-bot wall. 63 of 77 companies have >=1 verbatim address.

Best-guess address(es) for the named HR/leadership contact, built from the company email pattern (e.g. first.last@ / finitial+last@) with the basis noted (usually RocketReach/LeadIQ/ContactOut format data or a verbatim sample). ALL flagged (UNVERIFIED) — verify before sending. "Pattern undetermined" = no pattern could be established or no named contact.

Zeleron = zeleron.es (not .com); IMESA = imesazaragoza.es; Grupo Agora staff mail = agoragp.com; Totalsport = grupototalsport.com; Laftur now trades as TSB Zaragoza (tsbzaragoza.com); SAMCA staff = gruposamca.com (generic = samca.com); Adidas corporate = adidas.com; BSH = bshg.com.
IT Now S.A. (row 51) is the CaixaBank/IBM JV (HQ Barcelona) — confirm it is the intended Zaragoza target before outreach.
